name: EuiFieldSearch
description: Search text input with a magnifier icon.

append.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming after input.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

prepend.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before input
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

compressed.description: when `true` creates a shorter height input

isClearable.description: Shows a button that quickly clears any input

onSearch.description:
Called when the user presses [Enter] OR on change if the incremental prop is `true`.
If you don't need the on[Enter] functionality, prefer using onChange

incremental.description:
When `true` the search will be executed (that is, the `onSearch` will be called) as the
user types.
